name: Kirk Cameron
title: Actor & Evangelist
bio: American actor best known for his role as Mike Seaver on 'Growing Pains.' After his conversion to Christianity at age 17, he became a prominent evangelist, co-founding The Way of the Master ministry with Ray Comfort and starring in the 'Fireproof' and 'Left Behind' films.
faith: Kirk Cameron's conversion at 17 transformed his life and career. He has said, 'I was doing all the things that Hollywood says you should do to be happy... and I wasn't.' He became a bold evangelist, co-founding The Way of the Master with Ray Comfort and producing faith-based films like 'Fireproof,' which grossed $33 million on a $500,000 budget. He has been an outspoken advocate for biblical marriage, homeschooling, and the authority of Scripture.

tagline: From Growing Pains teen idol to bold evangelist for Christ
